OR code LIKE ?)) ==> Parameters: %关键字%(String), %关键字%(String) <== Columns: total <== Row: 14 <== Total: 1 ==> Preparing: SELECT id,code,name,type,credits,hours,description,created_at,updated_at FROM course WHERE ((name LIKE ? OR code LIKE ?)) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? ==> Parameters: %关键字%(String), %关键字%(String), 20(Long) <== Columns: id, code, name, type, credits, hours, description, created_at, updated_at <== Row: 307, KW1781369233287, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-14 00:47:13, 2026-06-14 00:47:13 <== Row: 290, KW1781367477007, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-14 00:17:57, 2026-06-14 00:17:57 <== Row: 272, KW1781361273692, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-13 22:34:34, 2026-06-13 22:34:34 <== Row: 255, KW1781351355953, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-13 19:49:16, 2026-06-13 19:49:16 <== Row: 227, KW1781350871403, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-13 19:41:11, 2026-06-13 19:41:11 <== Row: 211, KW1781350741780, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-13 19:39:02, 2026-06-13 19:39:02 <== Row: 195, KW1781350701507, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-13 19:38:22, 2026-06-13 19:38:22 <== Row: 170, KW1781198434792, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-12 01:20:35, 2026-06-12 01:20:35 <== Row: 152, KW1781196552788, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-12 00:49:13, 2026-06-12 00:49:13 <== Row: 135, KW1781196298886, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-12 00:44:59, 2026-06-12 00:44:59 <== Row: 107, KW1781195660799, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-12 00:34:21, 2026-06-12 00:34:21 <== Row: 90, KW1781195626798, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-12 00:33:47, 2026-06-12 00:33:47 <== Row: 73, KW1781194809252, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-12 00:20:09, 2026-06-12 00:20:09 <== Row: 5, KW001, 关键字搜索测试课程, ELECTIVE_MAJOR, 2.0, 32, <<BLOB>>, 2026-06-11 23:51:26, 2026-06-11 23:51:26 <== Total: 14 Closing non transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@dbc5ef]
